description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 49 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 48 mins. His time was mostly spent in Java (63%) and Markdown (23%), with other languages making up 13%. The data shows activity across 4 projects.
